---
name: Bug report
about: Something didn't work the way you expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear, single-paragraph description of the actual behavior.

## What you expected

What you thought should happen instead.

## How to reproduce

Minimal steps. If a config or input is needed, paste it.

```
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...
```

## Environment

Paste the output of `axocoatl doctor`:

```
$ axocoatl doctor
...
```

- OS + version:
- Axocoatl version (`axocoatl --version`):
- LLM provider + model:

## Logs

Paste any relevant log lines from `axocoatl dev` or the browser console.
Trim noise but keep timestamps and error chains intact.

```
...
```

## Anything else

Screenshots, related issues, your best guess at the root cause — anything
that would have helped you reproduce this faster.
